NAME

instrument_log.c - TODO: Add Doxygen documentation for instrumentation logging.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct asciichat_instr_only_selector
Selector for filtering instrumentation output by file, function, or module. struct asciichat_instr_only_list
Dynamic array of instrumentation selectors for filtering output. struct asciichat_instr_runtime
Per-thread instrumentation runtime state.

Macros


#define ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_HAVE_REGEX 1
#define posix_write write
#define ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_DEFAULT_BASENAME 'ascii-instr'
#define ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_MAX_LINE 4096
#define ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_MAX_SNIPPET 2048

Typedefs


typedef enum asciichat_instr_selector_type asciichat_instr_selector_type_t
typedef struct asciichat_instr_only_selector asciichat_instr_only_selector_t
Selector for filtering instrumentation output by file, function, or module. typedef struct asciichat_instr_only_list asciichat_instr_only_list_t
Dynamic array of instrumentation selectors for filtering output. typedef struct asciichat_instr_runtime asciichat_instr_runtime_t
Per-thread instrumentation runtime state.

Enumerations


enum asciichat_instr_selector_type { ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_SELECTOR_FILE_SUBSTRING = 0, ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_SELECTOR_FILE_GLOB = 1, ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_SELECTOR_FUNCTION_GLOB = 2, ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_SELECTOR_MODULE = 3 }

Functions


asciichat_instr_runtime_t * asciichat_instr_runtime_get (void)
void asciichat_instr_runtime_destroy (asciichat_instr_runtime_t *runtime)
void asciichat_instr_runtime_global_destroy (void)
void asciichat_instr_log_line (const char *file_path, uint32_t line_number, const char *function_name, const char *snippet, uint8_t is_macro_expansion)
bool asciichat_instr_coverage_enabled (void)
void asciichat_instr_log_pc (uintptr_t program_counter)

Detailed Description

TODO: Add Doxygen documentation for instrumentation logging.

Provides logging integration for runtime instrumentation and debugging. Needs documentation for: Log capture, instrumentation hooks, diagnostic output

Definition in file instrument_log.c.

Typedef Documentation

typedef struct asciichat_instr_only_list asciichat_instr_only_list_t

Dynamic array of instrumentation selectors for filtering output.

typedef struct asciichat_instr_only_selector asciichat_instr_only_selector_t

Selector for filtering instrumentation output by file, function, or module.

typedef struct asciichat_instr_runtime asciichat_instr_runtime_t

Per-thread instrumentation runtime state. Tracks state for source code instrumentation logging, including file descriptors, filter configuration, and rate limiting for the current thread.

typedef enum asciichat_instr_selector_type asciichat_instr_selector_type_t

Enumeration Type Documentation

enum asciichat_instr_selector_type

Function
  Documentation




bool asciichat_instr_coverage_enabled (void )


Definition at line 424 of file instrument_log.c.


424                                             {
425   if (g_disable_write) {
426     return false;
427   }
428 
429   // Initialize runtime once using lock-free lifecycle API
430   if (!lifecycle_is_initialized(&g_runtime_lc)) {
431     if (lifecycle_init_once(&g_runtime_lc)) {
432       asciichat_instr_runtime_init_once();
433       lifecycle_init_commit(&g_runtime_lc);
434     }
435   }
436 
437   return g_coverage_enabled;
438 }






References lifecycle_init_commit(),
    lifecycle_init_once(), and lifecycle_is_initialized().

void
  asciichat_instr_log_line (const char * file_path, uint32_t line_number, const
  char * function_name, const char * snippet, uint8_t
  is_macro_expansion)


Definition at line 274 of file instrument_log.c.


275                                                                                {
276   // Instrumentation is enabled by default when the binary is built with Source Print.
277   // Set ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_ENABLE=0 to disable tracing at runtime.
278   if (!g_instrumentation_enabled_checked) {
279     const char *enable_env = SAFE_GETENV("ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_ENABLE");
280     // Default to enabled (true) - only disable if explicitly set to "0", "false", "off", or "no"
281     if (enable_env != NULL && enable_env[0] != '\0') {
282       g_instrumentation_enabled = asciichat_instr_env_is_enabled(enable_env);
283     } else {
284       g_instrumentation_enabled = true; // Default to enabled when instrumented
285     }
286     g_instrumentation_enabled_checked = true;
287   }
288 
289   if (!g_instrumentation_enabled) {
290     return;
291   }
292 
293   if (g_disable_write) {
294     return;
295   }
296 
297   if (g_logging_reentry_guard) {
298     return;
299   }
300 
301   g_logging_reentry_guard = true;
302 
303   asciichat_instr_runtime_t *runtime = asciichat_instr_runtime_get();
304   if (runtime == NULL) {
305     goto cleanup;
306   }
307 
308   if (!asciichat_instr_should_log(runtime, file_path, line_number, function_name)) {
309     goto cleanup;
310   }
311 
312   runtime->call_counter++;
313   if (runtime->rate_enabled) {
314     const uint64_t counter = runtime->call_counter;
315     if (((counter - 1U) % runtime->rate) != 0U) {
316       goto cleanup;
317     }
318   }
319 
320   if (runtime->fd < 0) {
321     if (asciichat_instr_open_log_file(runtime) != 0) {
322       runtime->stderr_fallback = true;
323     }
324   }
325 
326   const int fd = runtime->stderr_fallback ? STDERR_FILENO : runtime->fd;
327   char buffer[ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_MAX_LINE];
328   size_t pos = 0;
329 
330   uint64_t realtime_ns = time_get_realtime_ns();
331   time_t sec = (time_t)(realtime_ns / NS_PER_SEC_INT);
332   long nsec = (long)(realtime_ns % NS_PER_SEC_INT);
333   struct tm tm_now;
334   memset(&tm_now, 0, sizeof(tm_now));
335   if (platform_gtime(&sec, &tm_now) != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
336     memset(&tm_now, 0, sizeof(tm_now));
337   }
338 
339   char timestamp[32];
340   size_t ts_len = strftime(timestamp, sizeof(timestamp), "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S", &tm_now);
341   if (ts_len == 0) {
342     SAFE_STRNCPY(timestamp, "1970-01-01T00:00:00", sizeof(timestamp));
343     ts_len = strlen(timestamp);
344   }
345 
346   char elapsed_buf[32];
347   elapsed_buf[0] = '\0';
348   if (g_ticks_initialized) {
349     uint64_t now_ns = time_get_ns();
350     uint64_t elapsed_ns = time_elapsed_ns(g_start_ns, now_ns);
351     if (time_pretty((uint64_t)elapsed_ns, -1, elapsed_buf, sizeof(elapsed_buf)) < 0) {
352       elapsed_buf[0] = '\0';
353     }
354   }
355 
356   runtime->sequence++;
357 
358   const char *elapsed_field = (elapsed_buf[0] != '\0') ? elapsed_buf : "-";
359 
360   const char *safe_file_path = (file_path != NULL) ? file_path : "<unknown>";
361   pos += safe_snprintf(buffer + pos, sizeof(buffer) - pos,
362                        "pid=%d tid=%llu seq=%llu ts=%.*s.%09ldZ elapsed=%s file=%s line=%u func=%s macro=%u snippet=",
363                        runtime->pid, (unsigned long long)runtime->thread_id, (unsigned long long)runtime->sequence,
364                        (int)ts_len, timestamp, nsec, elapsed_field, safe_file_path, line_number,
365                        function_name ? function_name : "<unknown>", (unsigned)is_macro_expansion);
366 
367   if (snippet != NULL) {
368     size_t snippet_len = strnlen(snippet, ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_MAX_SNIPPET);
369     for (size_t i = 0; i < snippet_len && pos < sizeof(buffer) - 2; ++i) {
370       const char ch = snippet[i];
371       switch (ch) {
372       case '\n':
373         buffer[pos++] = '\\';
374         buffer[pos++] = 'n';
375         break;
376       case '\r':
377         buffer[pos++] = '\\';
378         buffer[pos++] = 'r';
379         break;
380       case '\t':
381         buffer[pos++] = '\\';
382         buffer[pos++] = 't';
383         break;
384       default:
385         buffer[pos++] = ch;
386         break;
387       }
388     }
389   }
390 
391   if (pos >= sizeof(buffer) - 1) {
392     pos = sizeof(buffer) - 2;
393   }
394 
395   buffer[pos++] = '\n';
396   buffer[pos] = '\0';
397 
398   asciichat_instr_write_full(fd, buffer, pos);
399 
400   // Also echo to stderr if requested via environment variable
401   if (!g_echo_to_stderr_initialized) {
402     const char *echo_env = SAFE_GETENV("ASCII_CHAT_DEBUG_SELF_SOURCE_CODE_LOG_STDERR");
403     g_echo_to_stderr = asciichat_instr_env_is_enabled(echo_env);
404     g_echo_to_stderr_initialized = true;
405   }
406 
407   if (g_echo_to_stderr && !runtime->stderr_fallback) {
408     // Write to stderr in addition to the log file
409     // Suppress Windows deprecation warning for POSIX write function
410 #ifdef _WIN32
411 #pragma clang diagnostic push
412 #pragma clang diagnostic ignored "-Wdeprecated-declarations"
413 #endif
414     (void)posix_write(STDERR_FILENO, buffer, pos);
415 #ifdef _WIN32
416 #pragma clang diagnostic pop
417 #endif
418   }
419 
420 cleanup:
421   g_logging_reentry_guard = false;
422 }

void
  asciichat_instr_log_pc (uintptr_t program_counter)


Definition at line 440 of file instrument_log.c.


440                                                        {
441   if (!asciichat_instr_coverage_enabled()) {
442     return;
443   }
444 
445   char snippet[64];
446   safe_snprintf(snippet, sizeof(snippet), "pc=0x%zx", (size_t)program_counter);
447   asciichat_instr_log_line("__coverage__", 0, "<coverage>", snippet, ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_MACRO_NONE);
448 }

    asciichat_instr_log_line(), and safe_snprintf().

void
  asciichat_instr_runtime_destroy (asciichat_instr_runtime_t *
  runtime)


Definition at line 222 of file instrument_log.c.


222                                                                          {
223   if (runtime == NULL) {
224     return;
225   }
226 
227   if (runtime->fd >= 0) {
228     platform_close(runtime->fd);
229     runtime->fd = -1;
230   }
231 
232 #if ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_HAVE_REGEX
233   if (runtime->include_regex_valid) {
234     regfree(&runtime->include_regex);
235     runtime->include_regex_valid = false;
236   }
237   if (runtime->exclude_regex_valid) {
238     regfree(&runtime->exclude_regex);
239     runtime->exclude_regex_valid = false;
240   }
241   if (runtime->function_include_regex_valid) {
242     regfree(&runtime->function_include_regex);
243     runtime->function_include_regex_valid = false;
244   }
245   if (runtime->function_exclude_regex_valid) {
246     regfree(&runtime->function_exclude_regex);
247     runtime->function_exclude_regex_valid = false;
248   }
249 #endif
250 
251   asciichat_instr_only_list_destroy(&runtime->only_selectors);
252   SAFE_FREE(runtime);
253 }

asciichat_instr_runtime_t * asciichat_instr_runtime_get
  (void )


Definition at line 175 of file instrument_log.c.


175                                                              {
176   if (g_disable_write) {
177     return NULL;
178   }
179 
180   // Initialize runtime once using lock-free lifecycle API
181   if (!lifecycle_is_initialized(&g_runtime_lc)) {
182     if (lifecycle_init_once(&g_runtime_lc)) {
183       asciichat_instr_runtime_init_once();
184       lifecycle_init_commit(&g_runtime_lc);
185     }
186   }
187 
188   asciichat_instr_runtime_t *runtime = ascii_tls_get(g_runtime_key);
189   if (runtime != NULL) {
190     return runtime;
191   }
192 
193   runtime = SAFE_CALLOC(1, sizeof(*runtime), asciichat_instr_runtime_t *);
194   if (runtime == NULL) {
195     return NULL;
196   }
197 
198   runtime->pid = platform_get_pid();
199   runtime->thread_id = asciichat_thread_current_id();
200   runtime->sequence = 0;
201   runtime->call_counter = 0;
202   runtime->fd = -1;
203   runtime->filter_include = SAFE_GETENV("ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_INCLUDE");
204   runtime->filter_exclude = SAFE_GETENV("ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_EXCLUDE");
205   runtime->filter_thread = SAFE_GETENV("ASCII_INSTR_SOURCE_PRINT_THREAD");
206   runtime->filter_function_include = NULL;
207   runtime->filter_function_exclude = NULL;
208   runtime->filters_enabled = false;
209   runtime->rate = 1;
210   runtime->rate_enabled = false;
211 
212   asciichat_instr_runtime_configure(runtime);
213 
214   if (ascii_tls_set(g_runtime_key, runtime) != 0) {
215     SAFE_FREE(runtime);
216     return NULL;
217   }
218 
219   return runtime;
220 }

void
  asciichat_instr_runtime_global_destroy (void )


Definition at line 255 of file instrument_log.c.


255                                                   {
256   if (lifecycle_shutdown(&g_runtime_lc)) {
257     g_disable_write = true;
258     ascii_tls_key_delete(g_runtime_key);
259     g_ticks_initialized = false;
260     g_start_ns = 0;
261     g_coverage_enabled = false;
262     g_output_dir_set = false;
263     g_output_dir[0] = '\0';
264     g_instrumentation_enabled_checked = false;
265     g_instrumentation_enabled = false;
266     g_echo_to_stderr_initialized = false;
267     g_echo_to_stderr = false;
268   }
269 
270   // Reset g_disable_write so instrumentation can be re-enabled in subsequent tests
271   g_disable_write = false;
272 }






References ascii_tls_key_delete(), and
    lifecycle_shutdown().
